events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Given the package is missing the quantity takeoff/area count, I marked this `needs_more_info` rather than pass/fail — the visible pulls show no obvious defects, but completeness and full NEC 200.6/210.5 identification compliance can't be verified without that scope data. Recommended actions: obtain the takeoff and do a full identification walk before sign-off.
